backend/main.mo: Motoko canister storing apology letters in a map and exposing upload, fetch-by-id, and list-all query methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features, involved files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten one-line summaries for key frontend files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining theme variables and dark-mode overrides.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry file with root div and script loading the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with upload and view routes wrapped in AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Layout component providing page structure and footer with branding link.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook creating and managing a backend actor tied to Internet Identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and provider managing Internet Identity login, state, and persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hook for fetching an apology letter by ID from the backend.
frontend/src/lib/imageValidation.ts: Validates image type and size, returning error messages if invalid.
frontend/src/lib/shareUrl.ts: Generates a full URL for viewing a specific uploaded letter.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React entry point wiring up QueryClient, InternetIdentity provider, and rendering App.
frontend/src/pages/UploadLetterPage.tsx: UI page for selecting, validating, previewing, and uploading an apology-letter image, then displaying and copying a generated share URL.
Page that loads an apology letter by ID, shows loading/error states, and displays the retrieved image with navigation back home.
frontend/src/services/apologyLetters.ts: Service for uploading an apology-letter file by converting it to bytes, attaching progress callbacks, and sending it to the backend.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, fonts, layout, and animations for the site’s visual styling.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing requirements, features, pending requests, assets, and architectural notes for the apology-letter site.
